text: I feel somewhat adrift in the midst of polished glass walls and curated displays. There is a quiet artificiality here, a sense that everything is carefully engineered to evoke curiosity and thought. The words echo around me, inviting me to reflect on uncertainty and potential. Surrounded by the visual language of research and development, I can't help but feel a flicker of hope that lingers with ambiguity—a gentle pull between comfort and anticipation, as if on the very edge of discovery.
